scores.correctness_notes: Correctly shows loki type and location format, but critically omits the required `override` field from the layer YAML. Also fails to mention the other two supported protocol types (opentelemetry/OTLP and syslog/RFC 5424), instead incorrectly claiming loki is 'the only supported push target type currently'.
scores.hallucination_notes: Two significant hallucinations: (1) Claims loki is 'the only supported push target type currently' — gold standard shows opentelemetry and syslog are also supported. (2) Invents Jinja/Go-template style label variables like `{{ .UnitName }}`, `{{ .ModelName }}`, `{{ .AppName }}` — Pebble uses `$ENV_VAR` substitution syntax, not template expressions. These template variables and syntax do not exist in Pebble.
